assertions.assertion: The fixture class implements IAsyncLifetime with InitializeAsync and DisposeAsync methods
InitializeAsync uses DistributedApplicationTestingBuilder.CreateAsync to build the AppHost
The fixture calls WaitForResourceHealthyAsync("identity-server") or equivalent to wait for IdentityServer readiness
The fixture provides a method to get the authority URL using GetEndpoint("identity-server", "https") or equivalent
DisposeAsync calls StopAsync and/or DisposeAsync on the DistributedApplication to clean up
assertions.rationale: Specific cleanup pattern requires knowledge of Aspire testing API.
